chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Welcome back aliens my name is Davin Reddy and let's continue with the series on Python.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Now in this video we'll talk about binary formats.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: In fact not just binary we'll talk about different number systems.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Normally when you work in the programming world we work with binary formats and we work

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: with decimal system.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: So in the programming world we use a binary system and a decimal system.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: But apart from this we have two more systems which is octal and hexadecimal.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Now when do we use all this stuff?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: So in the networking field we use MAC address which is normally defined in hexadecimal format.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Same goes for IPv6 which is defined in hexadecimal format.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: In your computer we use binary format.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: In normal system we use decimal system.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: So let's understand how do we convert these values from one system to other system.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Now of course you can do it on paper or you can do it in a software or with the help of

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: codes.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Now before understanding how do you convert this using Python let's try it on paper first.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: You know we can in fact we can do it.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: So if I open my IDE you can convert a number from decimal to binary format.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Example if I want to convert a number let's say 25.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: So we have this number 25.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: I want to convert this into a binary format.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Now I don't know how many people of you how many of you know how to convert a number into

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: binary format.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: So people who are very beginner to the programming world they might not be knowing it.

chunks.text: And if you have experience that's great.

chunks.text: Now if you don't know how binary format works I would recommend you to go and watch some

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: videos on binary format or we'll try to do some in this video.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Let's say I want to convert this.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: We can use a function called as bin.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: So using bin function we can convert a number from decimal system to binary system.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Now when you say decimal system it means the base of the system is 10.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: And in binary system the base is 2.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Which means in decimal system we can go from 0 to 9.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: So we have 10 digits.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: In binary system we can go from 0 to 1.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: 2 digits.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: And that's why we say it's bits binary digits.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: So we have binary format there.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: In fact we have octal system where we have 8 digits.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: So it starts with 0 and it ends at 7.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: On the other hand we have hexadecimal system where we have 16 as a base.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: Now it starts with 0.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: It goes till 9 and after 9 it goes from A to F. So in total we have 16.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: So now let's come back from decimal to binary.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: We'll click on enter.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: And you can see this is your binary format.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: It's so simple.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: You just need to use a bin function and in bracket you have to pass 25.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: But hold on.

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: How do you convert this number?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: And even if you get this output how do you know this is the correct output?

chunks.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners | Number System Conversion in Python
chunks.text: So let me just take some time to explain you how to convert a number from a decimal system

chunks.text: So you have to continue this.
